---
id: move-entity
title: "Move an entity"
description: "Move the entity to the specified position. Supports both world coordinates and viewport (screen) coordinates."
sidebar_label: "Move an entity"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Move an entity"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/entities/{entity_id}/move"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Move the entity to the specified position. Supports both world coordinates and viewport (screen) coordinates.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
